arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Aurelien Tchouameni – ‘Of course I hear the whistles, but…’
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni has looked back to his best in recent games, but it has been a difficult ride to get to that point this season. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Risk Historic Champions League Knockout Stage Failure vs. Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have never been eliminated by Atlético Madrid in the Champions League knockout stage.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: William Saliba comments on contract talks amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba breaks his silence on contract talks with the Gunners amid ongoing speculation regarding interest from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Tchouameni: “Real Madrid will play for the win against Atlético Madrid”
arts.sum: In defense you have more time to play, but the difference is that it’s more complicated to stay focused. “At the start of every game, the important thing is to be focused.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “If you run a lot you can tie the game, if you make the difference you can win it”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti met with journalists for his usual pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League last 16 second leg, where he addressed a number of topics. Asked on what was required to win, Ancelotti was clear, “if you run a lot you can tie the game, if you make the difference you can win it.”

arts.ttl: Sky Sports Drop Big Update on Alexander-Arnold Leaving Liverpool for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool are yet to reach an agreement with defender Trent Alexander-Arnold over a new contract.
